items.headline: Intel jumps after Trump says Apple, Intel reached US chip deal
items.summary: Intel (INTC) surged 9% in premarket trading after President Trump said in a Truth Social post that Intel and Apple (AAPL) have agreed on a deal to design and build semiconductors in the US.

items.headline: Ripple Drops 6%, Bitcoin Falls 5% in Crypto Pullback Defying Stock Rally
items.summary: Ripple (CRYPTO:XRP) is down 6% over the past 24 hours, sliding to roughly $1.14 by Thursday afternoon. The drop marks a sharp risk-off turn for the token even as U.S. equity benchmarks push higher on the session. It’s the kind of session where the macro headlines for stocks and cryptocurrency seem to be pulling in ... Ripple Drops 6%, Bitcoin Falls 5% in Crypto Pullback Defying Stock Rally

items.headline: Micron Technology (MU) Is Up 17.0% After Nvidia HBM4 Win And AI Board Hire - Has The Bull Case Changed?
items.summary: Earlier this month, Micron Technology appointed Dr. Alexis Black Björlin, an AI, cloud, and semiconductor veteran, to its board and Governance and Sustainability Committee, while continuing to highlight surging demand and tight supply for its high‑bandwidth memory used in AI data centers. Her arrival, alongside Micron’s newly secured role as an HBM4 supplier for Nvidia’s upcoming Vera Rubin AI platform, underscores how deeply the company is embedding itself in the core infrastructure of...
